card_name_verified: The Blue Business® Plus Credit Card from American Express
_review_reason: Re-verified 2026-04-27: NerdWallet, FinanceBuzz, Nav, AwardWallet, UpgradedPoints all confirm Blue Business Plus has NO statement credits. Card is rewards-focused (2x MR on first $50k). The $100 software credit in prior staging was misattributed (likely confused with Business Gold or a different Amex biz card). Other features qualitative: no-fee employee cards, Vendor Pay/Bill.com integration, QuickBooks integration, purchase protection.
